title: チーム総合力アップ・素敵な差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello again, Trainer. Your team has been making
stupendous progress!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I've brought another small gift for you today...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And I've also further upgraded your clubroom!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll continue working hard with your
team as you aim for ever greater heights! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team is delighted by the gift as well as the
additional clubroom upgrade, and our bonds
grow deeper!
